reasoning_model_1: The user requested the text 'Hmm…goo…good morning…a bit sleepy.' with a 'halting rhythm'. reasoning_model_2: Model 2 followed the text much more closely, though it missed the initial 'Hmm'. model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 2 attempted the stuttering text (producing 'Goo... good') and inserted heavy pauses, successfully creating the requested halting rhythm. Although Model 2 missed the word 'Hmm', its performance on the core feature and overall adherence to the style makes it superior to Model 1, which effectively normalized the prompt.
